headlines.title: Sen. Roger Marshall says U.S. strikes on Iran are a ‘mop-up operation’
headlines.description: The Kansas senator’s comments came hours after the U.S. launched fresh strikes and Tehran targeted sites in Bahrain and Kuwait.

headlines.title: Trump’s ‘big, beautiful bill’ is bringing a big set of student loan changes
headlines.description: Starting Wednesday, many student borrowers may tackle higher repayment requirements, fewer program options and greater loan limits.

headlines.title: Great American State Fair attendees say they haven’t noticed politics overshadowing the event
headlines.description: Trump kicked off the event with a headlining speech Wednesday after musical acts dropped out of the lineup citing concerns over partisanship.

headlines.title: Remembering Alan Greenspan and Andrea Mitchell's joint Meet the Press interview (2007)
headlines.description: Former Federal Reserve Chair Alan Greenspan joined Meet the Press with his wife, NBC News chief foreign affairs correspondent Andrea Mitchell, in 2007. Greenspan passed away on June 22, 2026, at 100 years old.

headlines.title: Chris Murphy says Democrats should 'accept' Trump voters, not embrace socialism: Full interview
headlines.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Sen. Chris Murphy (D-Conn.) reacts to the latest democratic socialist primary wins in New York and why he’s advocating for a “big tent” Democratic Party that includes Republican voters.

headlines.title: Chris Murphy calls for $25 minimum wage: 'This is the kind of idea that brings Trump voters over'
headlines.description: Sen. Chris Murphy (D-Conn.) tells Meet the Press his proposal to gradually increase minimum wage to $25 per hour is a “unifying issue” that will spur job creation.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Rep. Julia Letlow wins Louisiana Senate GOP runoff
headlines.description: Letlow defeated state Treasurer John Fleming, NBC News projects. Sen. Bill Cassidy didn’t make the runoff.

headlines.title: Trump’s endorsement faces another test in Louisiana Senate primary runoff
headlines.description: Polls have closed in Louisiana, where President Donald Trump’s endorsement is once again be on the ballot Saturday in the GOP primary runoff for Senate in Louisiana

headlines.title: Trump says he’s nominating former Oklahoma State Trooper Lance Schroyer to be ICE director
headlines.description: Acting Director Todd Lyons said he was leaving the agency in April.

headlines.title: U.S. government gives Anthropic green light for limited re-release of Mythos 5
headlines.description: The U.S. government is allowing Anthropic to deploy its Mythos 5 model to a select group of customers and partners, according to a letter from Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick to Anthropic that was seen by NBC News

headlines.title: Ex-Trump adviser John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling classified information
headlines.description: The former national security adviser pleaded guilty in federal court to mishandling classified information related to his work during Trump’s first term.
